creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-15 21:17:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/pear-HTTP_WebDAV_Client Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  HTTP_WebDAV_Client is a RFC2518 compliant stream wrapper
  that allows to use WebDAV server resources like a regular
  file system from within PHP.
  
  WWW: http://pear.php.net/package/HTTP_WebDAV_Client/
  
  PR:             ports/128855
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping<wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2174    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/www/pear-HTTP_WebDAV_Client/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/pear-HTTP_WebDAV_Client/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/pear-HTTP_WebDAV_Client/pkg-descr (new)
